final:
module RefModule (
  input clock,
  input reset,
  output reg [3:0] count
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clock or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
      count <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
